zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gernon於大約1208年出生在英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_ 希丘特時，她的父親William de Gernon20歲，母親Beatrice Theydon19歲。她於1260年與Thomas Foljambe在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1266年在英國越可爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Gernon于大约1208年出生在英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_ 希丘特时，她的父亲William de Gernon20岁，母亲Beatrice Theydon19岁。她于1260年与Thomas Foljambe在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1266年在英国越可爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gernon was born about 1208, in Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, England, her father, William de Gernon, was 20 and her mother, Beatrice Theydon, was 19. She married Thomas Foljambe in 1260, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1266, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Gernon est née environ 1208, à Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Gernon, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Theydon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Foljambe en 1260, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1266, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Gernon um 1208 in Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Gernon 20 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Theydon 19. Sie hat 1260 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England Thomas Foljambe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1266 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gernon è nata il circa 1208 nel Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, William de Gernon, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Theydon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Foljambe nel 1260, nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1266, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Gernonが約1208年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエル シルクウイトで生まれた時，父William de Gernonは20歳，母Beatrice Theydonは19歳であった。1260年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルでThomas Foljambeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1266年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gernon(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 더비실르 베이케웰 시르쿠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Gernon(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Theydon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 Thomas Foljambe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1266년 영국 요르크실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Tideswell, England: Tideswell, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gernon nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Gernon, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Theydon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Foljambe em 1260, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1266, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gernon родилась около 1208 г. в местности беикюелл сиркуит, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Gernon было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Theydon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Foljambe в 1260 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1266 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gernon nació aproximadamente 1208, en Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Gernon, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Beatrice Theydon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Foljambe en 1260, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1266, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
